query:
SELECT w.id as workflow_id, w.name as workflow_name, s.id as stage_id, s.stageName, s.stageOrder 
FROM approvalWorkflows w 
LEFT JOIN approvalStages s ON s.workflowId = w.id 
WHERE w.name = 'Standard Access Request';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user BsRQq1X2Mh9kZmK.6749932367bb --database WqXabcMRQ5aEFJ4QyeefuN --execute SELECT w.id as workflow_id, w.name as workflow_name, s.id as stage_id, s.stageName, s.stageOrder 
FROM approvalWorkflows w 
LEFT JOIN approvalStages s ON s.workflowId = w.id
